creator: j@ida.interface-business.de
text:
Some of the shipped Perl 5 modules require .ph files which have not
been created yet.

Fix: 

Create /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/i386-freebsd and its subdirectories,
and run /usr/local/bin/h2ph to fill in these files.
How-To-Repeat: 
use Sys::Syslog;

...and try compiling this Perl file.
